steps.title: Compare route types
steps.content: The statement needs an example showing an international route carrying more passengers than a highly traveled domestic route. That requires comparing passenger counts, not distances, and the comparison should use routes from the same year.

steps.title: Use passenger counts
steps.content: A compares distance rather than passengers. B compares passenger counts, but it does not show the international route exceeding the domestic route. C compares the same international route across two years rather than contrasting route types. The relevant same-year comparison shows the exception clearly. The answer is D.
